title: Senior Financial Analyst - Manappuram Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Manappuram Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Manappuram Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Manappuram Finance:
Manappuram Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manappuram Finance!
